ID_ITEM_DEV_PROD		INTEGER		NOT NULL PK AI
ID_ITEM				SMALLINT	NOT NULL 
ID_PRODUTO			INTEGER		NOT NULL
DESCRICAO			VARCHAR(60)	NOT NULL
UM				CHAR(2)		NOT NULL
VALOR_UNITARIO			DECIMAL(15,2)  	NOT NULL
VALOR_TOTAL			DECIMAL(15,2)	NOT NULL
QUANTIDADE			DECIMAL(15,2)   NOT NULL
ID_DEVOLUCAO			INTEGER		NOT NULL FK

/******************************************************************************/
/****              Generated by IBExpert 11/08/2021 10:39:13               ****/
/******************************************************************************/

set sql dialect 3;

set names none;



/******************************************************************************/
/****                                Tables                                ****/
/******************************************************************************/


create generator gen_item_dev_prod_id;

create table item_dev_prod (
    id_item_dev_prod  integer not null,
    id_item           smallint not null,
    id_produto        integer not null,
    descricao         varchar(60) not null,
    um                char(2) not null,
    valor_unitario    decimal(15,2) not null,
    valor_total       decimal(15,2) not null,
    quantidade        decimal(15,2) not null,
    id_devolucao      integer not null
);




/******************************************************************************/
/****                             Primary Keys                             ****/
/******************************************************************************/

alter table item_dev_prod add constraint pk_item_dev_prod primary key (id_item_dev_prod);


/******************************************************************************/
/****                             Foreign Keys                             ****/
/******************************************************************************/

alter table item_dev_prod add constraint fk_item_dev_prod_1 foreign key (id_devolucao) references devolucao (id_devolucao);


/******************************************************************************/
/****                               Triggers                               ****/
/******************************************************************************/


set term ^ ;


/******************************************************************************/
/****                         Triggers for tables                          ****/
/******************************************************************************/



/* Trigger: ITEM_DEV_PROD_BI */
create trigger item_dev_prod_bi for item_dev_prod
active before insert position 0
as
begin
  if (new.id_item_dev_prod is null) then
    new.id_item_dev_prod = gen_id(gen_item_dev_prod_id,1);
end
^


set term ; ^
